name: Thoracic Spine MRI
description: Thoracic spine MRI for cord and soft tissue evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the thoracic spine with sagittal T1, T2, and axial T2 sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Spinal Cord
sections.content: Spinal cord [has normal signal / no cord edema / no mass / no syrinx] throughout the thoracic spine.

sections.name: Disc Levels
sections.content: Thoracic discs show [normal height / no significant bulge / no herniation] at all levels.

sections.name: Conus Medullaris
sections.content: Conus medullaris terminates at [T12/L1 / normal level / no tethering / no mass].

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: Vertebral bodies [have normal marrow signal / no lesion / no compression].

impression:
1. No cord abnormality.
2. No significant disc herniation.
3. Normal conus position.
4. Normal thoracic spine MRI.
